title: adenophora biloba
intro: Adenophora biloba, also known as the bugbane or Adenophora, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Adenophora biloba include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Adenophora biloba can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
